title: Proof of Honor
description: This mod adds decorative blocks such as champion trophies, medals, silk banners, and other awards.
body:
## Overview
This mod is an unofficial Java edition implementation of Proof of Honor, originally created by @凌锋轨迹LF , the forge 1.20.1 created by @蒜泥茄子.

This mod adds various decorative blocks including champion trophies, medals, silk banners, and other award-themed decorations.


Authorized by the Creator

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c5e9a7d45f1bf348eafb1e957df8542b888cc90.png)
